title: Actions
description: Outstanding extension-defined Action instances, keyed by reverse-domain extension name.

instance.description: Common fields for one outstanding Action instance are id, required, and optional config. Extensions define instance-specific processing data under config. Additional properties are permitted for forward compatibility.

id.description: Identifier for this Action instance, unique for the lifetime of the containing resource.

required.description: Whether this Action instance gates the parent-specific effect defined by its extension.

config.description: Extension-owned configuration for this Action instance.
